title: Update documentation and About dialog
instructions:
Update project documentation and the About dialog:
1. Update README.md with latest features (file operations, context menu improvements, panel width saving)
2. Update CHANGELOG.md with recent changes
3. Update the Help -> About dialog text to reflect current version and features

1783657317.0963361.instruction:
Update README.md to include:
- File operations (Copy, Paste, Rename, Remove)
- Context menu improvements (closes when clicking outside)
- Panel width saving on resize
- Updated features list and screenshots description

1783657317.0965064.instruction:
Add new version entry to CHANGELOG.md with:
- File operations (Copy, Paste, Rename, Remove)
- Context menu auto-close fix
- Panel width persistence
- Code refactoring (dialogs.py, navigation.py)

1783657317.1350155.instruction: Update the About dialog in app.py or menu_bar.py to show current version (1.4.0) and updated description of features. Make it more informative and professional.
